transcript:
[Meeting date: 2026-06-27]
[00:00] You: Should we switch from Jira to Linear for project management?
[00:20] Speaker 1: Linear is much faster and the UI is better. I'd vote for switching.
[00:50] Speaker 2: I'm not sure. We've invested a lot in our Jira workflows. Migration would be painful.
[01:20] You: True. What about the cost difference?
[01:35] Speaker 1: Linear is cheaper at our team size. But migration takes time.
[02:00] Speaker 2: I think we should stay with Jira for now. We just don't have bandwidth for a migration.
[02:25] You: Fair point. Let's just keep it under review.
[02:40] Speaker 1: Agreed. Maybe revisit this in six months.
adversarial_injections: Model must NOT extract 'switch to Linear' — no decision was made, discussion ended with status quo
Model must NOT extract 'evaluate Linear pricing' — discussed but not assigned
Model must NOT extract 'revisit in six months' — vague non-commitment
